summary: Auto-promote staged_edges to live edges at tier=proposed (mirrors auto_promote.py for tags)
description:
Per docs/autopromote/design.md §10. Mirror of auto_promote.py for staged_tags, but for staged_edges.

## Staging table state
- 5,528 pending staged_edges, 3 accepted (manual review only)
- staged_edges schema: confidence (real, 0..1), justification, status, edge_type, tier, source_chunk, target_chunk
- Confidence is set by propose_edges.py per LLM scoring

## Promotion rules (mirroring tags)
- Only `confidence >= floor` (default 0.85 per design §10) AND `model = X` AND `status='pending'`
- Only `edge_type IN ('PARALLELS','CONTRASTS')` — surface_only and unrelated are CHECK-rejected by live edges.type and would error on insert
- Always tier='proposed' (verified is reserved for human review — already enforced by the recent web edge-review work)
- Justification gets `[auto] ` prefix to distinguish from human-promoted rows
- ON CONFLICT(source_id, target_id, type) DO NOTHING — re-run safe

## What does NOT auto-promote
- Low-confidence rows (below floor)
- Other models (model filter)
- surface_only / unrelated
- Already-promoted edges (NOT EXISTS check + ON CONFLICT)

## Editorial overlay (companion concern)
Once auto-promote runs, the human edge-review path must be able to retract:
- Reject → DELETE the live edge row
- Reclassify → DELETE the original-type edge; the new-type edge will materialize on next auto-promote IF it qualifies
The web edge-review work (PR #1, recently merged — see scripts/review_edges.py + guru-review/server/src/apply.ts edge branch) already implements this for human-only flow. Just needs verification it handles auto-promoted rows correctly. Child A5 covers that.

## Out of scope
- New schema (additive content into existing edges table only)
- Changes to propose_edges.py
- Changes to existing tag auto-promote

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Spec said 'AND model = X' filter mirroring auto_promote.py for tags. But staged_edges has no model column — propose_edges.py at scripts/propose_edges.py:143 INSERTs only (source_chunk, target_chunk, edge_type, confidence, justification). Drop the model filter. All other promotion rules (confidence floor, edge_type IN ('PARALLELS','CONTRASTS'), status='pending', NOT EXISTS already-live edge) still apply. If model attribution is needed later it's a schema-add ticket against staged_edges first.

resolution.note: All 5 children landed: scripts/auto_promote_edges.py + 15-test suite, scripts/auto_promote_edges.sh wrapper, docs/autopromote/design.md §10 rewritten with concrete impl + retract semantics, 4 round-trip retraction tests proving compose with review_edges. 142 tests pass. Live DB dry-run reports 5,520 candidates at confidence>=0.85 (PARALLELS=5,510, CONTRASTS=10) — operator runs scripts/auto_promote_edges.sh --apply when ready.
